title: Senior Procurement Executive
description:
ROLE RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Establish, build and maintain relations with all key Vendors
  • Create, set and maintain department KPIs
  • Sources for new products for cost-effectiveness and Calls for Food Tender
  • Support all users for all Purchase Orders with E-Procurement System and meet Finance month end closing deadlines
  • To attend to complaints and feedback from users regarding supplier services, product quality and quantity issues
  • Ensure smooth delivery of products to all users.
  • Coordinate all administrative matters, liaising with all departments and customers directly, as well on new strategic initiatives with Corporate Chef and new opening projects
  • Provide Management with data and reports related to purchasing activities as and when required
  • Periodic review to Management on purchasing system improvements and streamlining purchasing processes
  • To undertake whatever-related duties or tasks that may be assigned by the Superior from time to time
  • Working Location: Bukom Island

ROLE REQUIREMENTS

  • Preferably with Diploma or Degree in Business/Purchasing/Supply Chain Management or a related discipline

  • Minimum 3 years of purchasing/sourcing experience in the hospitality/F&B/Entertainment industry

  • Proficient in MS Office

  • Resourceful and meticulous with excellent negotiation, problem-solving, and communication skills with Vendors and Stakeholders

  • Good interpersonal skills with the ability to communicate with people at all levels

  • Able to work independently and a good team player

postedCompany.description:
The Wok People (TWP) is a provider of one-stop solution on employee cafeteria management. We are experts in the local food culture, serving up nutritious home-style cooking for thousands of employees island-wide. Our diverse cooks who are versed in multi-national and cultural food, serves up special cuisine to spice up everyday dining.  "People First" is the basis TWP started on and held as a fundamental core value.


Our strong belief guides us to apply a holistic approach to our staff welfare system, with great remuneration package and customized training pathways, as well as seeking external platforms and exchange opportunities for them to grow and develop.   


Above all, every employee of TWP is a dear family member, whom we cherish. Our large number of long service staff are testimonies of our application of this core value.   DIFFERENT CULTURES, ONE FAMILY.  


We are always on the lookout for the passionate and committed personnel to be part of the team and this big family.
postedCompany.name: THE WOK PEOPLE PTE. LTD.
